named-native-query.name: CubridGetAttrs
named-native-query.query: SELECT A.CLASS_NAME AS objNm , B.ATTR_NAME AS attrNm , B.COMMENT AS attrNmKr , CASE WHEN B.DATA_TYPE = 'STRING' THEN 'VARCHAR' ELSE B.DATA_TYPE END AS dataType , B.PREC AS dataLen , B.SCALE AS dataDecimalLen , CASE WHEN B.IS_NULLABLE = 'YES' THEN 'Y' END AS nullableYn , CASE WHEN D.KEY_ATTR_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' END AS pkYn , CASE WHEN F.KEY_ATTR_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' END AS fkYn , B.DEFAULT_VALUE AS defaultVal , B.DEF_ORDER + 1 AS attrOrder FROM DB_CLASS A INNER JOIN DB_ATTRIBUTE B ON B.CLASS_NAME = A.CLASS_NAME LEFT JOIN DB_INDEX C ON C.IS_PRIMARY_KEY = 'YES' AND C.CLASS_NAME = B.CLASS_NAME LEFT JOIN DB_INDEX_KEY D ON D.CLASS_NAME = C.CLASS_NAME AND D.INDEX_NAME = C.INDEX_NAME AND D.KEY_ATTR_NAME = B.ATTR_NAME LEFT JOIN DB_INDEX E ON E.IS_FOREIGN_KEY = 'YES' AND E.CLASS_NAME = B.CLASS_NAME LEFT JOIN DB_INDEX_KEY F ON F.CLASS_NAME = E.CLASS_NAME AND F.INDEX_NAME = E.INDEX_NAME AND F.KEY_ATTR_NAME = B.ATTR_NAME WHERE A.is_system_class = 'NO' AND A.CLASS_TYPE = 'CLASS' AND UPPER(A.OWNER_NAME) = :owner GROUP BY objNm, attrNm ORDER BY objNm, attrOrder

named-native-query.name: CubridGetObjs
named-native-query.query: SELECT A.OWNER_NAME AS objOwner ,A.CLASS_NAME AS objNm ,A.COMMENT AS objNmkr ,count(B.ATTR_NAME) AS objAttrCnt ,'' AS objCretDt ,'' AS objUpdtDt FROM DB_CLASS A, DB_ATTRIBUTE B WHERE A.CLASS_NAME = B.CLASS_NAME AND UPPER(A.OWNER_NAME) = :owner AND A.CLASS_TYPE = 'CLASS' AND A.is_system_class = 'NO' GROUP BY A.CLASS_NAME ORDER BY objOwner, objNm

named-native-query.name: OracleGetAttrs
named-native-query.query: SELECT A.TABLE_NAME AS objNm, A.COLUMN_NAME AS attrNm, A.COL_CMT AS attrNmKr, CASE WHEN A.DATA_TYPE = 'VARCHAR2' or A.DATA_TYPE = 'NVARCHAR' THEN 'VARCHAR' WHEN A.DATA_TYPE = 'NCHAR' THEN 'CHAR' WHEN A.DATA_TYPE = 'FLOAT' THEN 'NUMERIC' WHEN A.DATA_TYPE = 'NUMBER' THEN 'NUMERIC' WHEN A.DATA_TYPE = 'LONG' or A.DATA_TYPE = 'NCLOB' THEN 'CLOB' WHEN A.DATA_TYPE = 'BFILE' THEN 'BLOB' WHEN A.DATA_TYPE like 'TIMESTAMP%' THEN 'TIMESTAMP' ELSE A.DATA_TYPE END AS dataType, A.LEN AS dataLen, A.DATA_SCALE AS dataDecimalLen, A.NULLABLE AS nullableYn, B.POS AS pkYn, C.FK_POS fkYn, A.DATA_DEFAULT AS defaultVal, A.COLUMN_ID AS attrOrder FROM (SELECT S1.OWNER , S1.TABLE_NAME, S3.COMMENTS AS TAB_CMT, S1.COLUMN_NAME, S2.COMMENTS AS COL_CMT, S1.DATA_TYPE, CASE WHEN S1.DATA_PRECISION IS NOT NULL THEN DATA_PRECISION ELSE S1.DATA_LENGTH END AS LEN, DATA_SCALE, NULLABLE, COLUMN_ID, DATA_DEFAULT FROM ALL_TAB_COLUMNS S1, ALL_COL_COMMENTS S2, ALL_TAB_COMMENTS S3 WHERE S1.OWNER = S2.OWNER AND S1.TABLE_NAME = S2.TABLE_NAME AND S1.COLUMN_NAME = S2.COLUMN_NAME AND S1.OWNER = S3.OWNER AND S3.TABLE_TYPE = 'TABLE' AND S1.TABLE_NAME = S3.TABLE_NAME ) A, (SELECT T1.OWNER, T1.TABLE_NAME, T2.COLUMN_NAME, 'Y' AS POS FROM (SELECT OWNER, TABLE_NAME, CONSTRAINT_NAME FROM USER_CONSTRAINTS WHERE CONSTRAINT_TYPE = 'P' )T1, (SELECT OWNER, TABLE_NAME, CONSTRAINT_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, POSITION FROM USER_CONS_COLUMNS ) T2 WHERE T1.OWNER = T2.OWNER AND T1.TABLE_NAME = T2.TABLE_NAME AND T1.CONSTRAINT_NAME = T2.CONSTRAINT_NAME ) B, (SELECT DISTINCT T1.OWNER, T1.TABLE_NAME, T2.COLUMN_NAME, 'Y' AS FK_POS FROM (SELECT OWNER, TABLE_NAME, CONSTRAINT_NAME FROM USER_CONSTRAINTS WHERE CONSTRAINT_TYPE = 'R' )T1, (SELECT OWNER, TABLE_NAME, CONSTRAINT_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, POSITION FROM USER_CONS_COLUMNS ) T2 WHERE T1.OWNER = T2.OWNER AND T1.TABLE_NAME = T2.TABLE_NAME AND T1.CONSTRAINT_NAME = T2.CONSTRAINT_NAME ) C WHERE A.OWNER = B.OWNER(+) AND A.TABLE_NAME = B.TABLE_NAME(+) AND A.COLUMN_NAME = B.COLUMN_NAME(+) AND A.OWNER = C.OWNER(+) AND A.TABLE_NAME = C.TABLE_NAME(+) AND A.COLUMN_NAME = C.COLUMN_NAME(+) AND UPPER(A.OWNER) = :owner ORDER BY objNm, attrOrder

named-native-query.name: OracleGetObjs
named-native-query.query: SELECT distinct S1.OWNER as objOwner --OWNER명 ,S1.TABLE_NAME as objNm --영문테이블명 ,S2.COMMENTS as objNmKr --한글테이블명 ,(SELECT count(COLUMN_NAME) FROM ALL_TAB_COLUMNS WHERE OWNER = S1.OWNER AND TABLE_NAME = S1.TABLE_NAME) as objAttrCnt --테이블컬럼개수 ,to_char(S3.CREATED,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') as objCretDt --등록일자 ,to_char(S3.LAST_DDL_TIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') as objUpdtDt --수정일자 FROM ALL_TABLES S1 ,ALL_TAB_COMMENTS S2 ,ALL_OBJECTS S3 WHERE 1=1 AND S1.OWNER = S2.OWNER AND S1.TABLE_NAME = S2.TABLE_NAME AND S1.OWNER = S3.OWNER AND S1.TABLE_NAME = S3.OBJECT_NAME AND S2.TABLE_TYPE = 'TABLE' AND S3.OBJECT_TYPE = 'TABLE' AND S1.TABLE_NAME NOT LIKE '%TEMP%' AND S1.OWNER NOT IN ('SYS') AND S1.TABLESPACE_NAME NOT IN ('SYSTEM' , 'SYSAUX') AND UPPER(S1.OWNER) = :owner -- Owner명 입력 ORDER BY objOwner, objNm

named-native-query.name: MariaDBGetAttrs
named-native-query.query: SELECT t1.table_name AS objNm ,t2.column_name AS attrNm ,t2.column_comment AS attrNmKr ,CASE WHEN t2.is_nullable = 'YES' THEN 'Y' WHEN t2.is_nullable = 'NO' THEN 'N' END AS nullableYn ,t2.DATA_TYPE AS dataType ,CASE WHEN t2.NUMERIC_PRECISION is not null THEN t2.NUMERIC_PRECISION ELSE t2.CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH END AS dataLen ,t2.NUMERIC_SCALE AS dataDecimalLen ,CASE WHEN t2.column_key = 'PRI' THEN 'Y' END AS pkYn ,CASE WHEN t2.FK_COLUMN is not null THEN 'Y' END AS fkYn ,t2.column_default AS defaultVal ,t2.ORDINAL_POSITION AS attrOrder FROM (SELECT table_schema, table_name, table_comment FROM information_schema.TABLES) t1, (SELECT table_schema, table_name, ORDINAL_POSITION, column_name, DATA_TYPE, column_key, (select column_name from information_schema.key_column_usage where table_schema = c1.table_schema and table_name = c1.table_name and referenced_table_name is not null) as FK_COLUMN, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH, NUMERIC_PRECISION, NUMERIC_SCALE, is_nullable, column_default, column_comment FROM information_schema.COLUMNS c1) t2 WHERE upper(t1.TABLE_SCHEMA) = :owner AND t1.table_schema = t2.table_schema AND t1.table_name = t2.table_name ORDER BY objNm, attrOrder

named-native-query.name: MariaDBGetObjs
named-native-query.query: SELECT distinct S1.TABLE_SCHEMA as objOwner #OWNER명 , S1.TABLE_NAME as objNm #영문테이블명 , S1.TABLE_COMMENT as objNmKr #한글테이블명 , count(S2.COLUMN_NAME) over(partition by S1.TABLE_SCHEMA, S1.TABLE_NAME) as objAttrCnt #테이블컬럼개수 , to_char(S1.CREATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') as objCretDt #생성일자 , to_char(S1.UPDATE_TIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') as objUpdtDt #수정일자 FROM information_schema.TABLES S1, information_schema.COLUMNS S2 WHERE S1.TABLE_SCHEMA = S2.TABLE_SCHEMA AND S1.TABLE_NAME = S2.TABLE_NAME AND upper(S1.TABLE_SCHEMA) = :owner AND TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' ORDER BY objOwner, objNm
